channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon acquires Rivr, maker of a stair-climbing delivery robot
item.description: Amazon and Jeff Bezos had previously invested in the startup.

item.title: Finally, a Garmin Fenix 8 rival? Amazfit 'plans to expand its premium product lineup' in revealing new info
item.description: Not just cheap watches: Amazfit is skewing premium alongside developing a "hybrid training platform".

item.title: Look at This Treasure Trove of Unseen Photos From the Filming of ‘Return of the Jedi’
item.description: Behind-the-scenes 'Star Wars' photos taken by visual effects artist Stuart Ziff are going up for auction at Propstore.

item.title: Alphabet no longer has a controlling stake in its life sciences business Verily
item.description: Alphabet's life sciences business Verily is restructuring and raising money as a new corporate entity. Verily announced that with its $300 million investment round, it will change from an LLC to a corporation and rename itself Verily Health Inc. As a result, Alphabet now has a minority stake rather than a controlling one in the business. Similar to every other tech business, this chapter for Verily will be focused on AI. “From research to care, our customers need solutions that bring the best of clinical and scientific rigor together with AI to deliver the next generation of healthcare - one t...

item.title: States are suing the EPA for relinquishing its role as a greenhouse gas emissions regulator
item.description: California, Massachusetts, Connecticut and New York are leading a group of 20 other states in suing the US Environmental Protection Agency for renouncing its ability to regulate greenhouse gas emissions, The New York Times reports. The lawsuit specifically argues that the EPA's decision to rescind a 2009 study that determined greenhouse gases are dangerous to public health was illegal. The study, which is the source of what's called the "Endangerment Finding," was one of several justifications — along with things like the Clean Air Act — for the agency's ability to regulate emissions.Rescindin...

item.title: Jeff Bezos reportedly wants $100 billion to buy and transform old manufacturing firms with AI
item.description: The Amazon magnate has a new project centered around acquiring industrial firms and revamping them with AI technology.

item.title: Everyone hates this Pokémon, but it's one of the best you can use in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen — here’s how you can obtain it on Nintendo Switch and Switch 2
item.description: This game-changing trade was vital for me in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen for Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 — here’s how to access it.

item.title: Crimson Desert's puzzles can be quite challenging — but there's one simple mechanic that means you might not even need to complete them
item.description: Don't want to focus on completing puzzles for skill points in Crimson Desert? Well, there's an easier alternative.

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: Nvidia’s ‘Super Bowl of AI,’ Tesla Disappoints, and Meta’s VR Metaverse ‘Shutdown’
item.description: In this episode, we dive into Nvidia’s annual developer conference and what CEO Jensen Huang is saying about the future of the company.
